# Rockhounding Finder

Rockhounding Finder is in an editorial rebuild. Its legacy mineral-location records are not presented as current public collecting recommendations.

The public homepage explains that a mineral occurrence or historical mining record does not establish current access or collecting permission. State and location routes remain available for reference but are noindex, and visitors are directed to verify ownership, active mining claims, closures, protected resources, and current rules with the responsible authority.

The site does not currently load Google AdSense or analytics. No affiliate offer is active.

Contact: contact@rockhoundingfinder.com
Last reviewed: July 2026
